description: The plan agent's decomposition of the brief into a dependency-ordered STACK of units. depends_on forms an acyclic graph; independent units are developed in parallel.

units.description: The stack, smallest coherent slices first.

unit_id.description: Stable, unique id for this unit (e.g. u1, u2).

goal.description: The concrete outcome this unit must produce.

files_hint.description: Files the unit is expected to touch.

depends_on.description: unit_ids whose LANDED work this unit must branch on; empty for a root unit.

summary.description: How the stack decomposes the brief and why.

not_covered.description: Parts of the brief NOT covered by any unit.
